description: A contemplative daily art practice with museum and astronomy APIs as your gallery.

tools.name: planetary_apod-get
tools.description: Fetch the Astronomy Picture of the Day for a given date or date range. Anonymous via DEMO_KEY. Optional: api_key, date, start_date (plus 3 more). Returns the Apod.

params.name: api_key
params.description: NASA API key. Defaults to DEMO_KEY (rate-limited).

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start date for a range query (YYYY-MM-DD)

params.name: end_date
params.description: End date for a range query (YYYY-MM-DD)

params.name: thumbs
params.description: Include thumbnail URLs for video APODs
